The Korean audio drama is gone!
Guys I think Pontos might not be a nice man
this audio drama is driving me insane especially the sound effects like oh my god im going to walk into the ocean to meet Pontos soon.

**V2.5.2 狂欢之行**

「欢迎来到厄波扬斯，守密人。今天的狂欢要开始了，所有人都在等着你呢。」
「不论你想带些什么，我都会给你一个尽兴的夜晚。」

你只能带1件东西进场，它或将决定你在这场狂欢中的感官体验。做出选择吧！庞托斯给大家准备了「银芯×200」。

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

**V2.5.2 A Night of Revelry**

"Welcome to Ebwynnos, Keeper. Tonight's revelry is about to begin—and everyone is waiting for you."
"Whatever you choose to bring, I'll give you a night to remember."

You may bring only one thing inside, and it may shape what this revelry feels like for you. Make your choice! Pontos has prepared Silver ×200 for everyone.

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

**V2.5.2 광란의 행진**

"에뷔노스에 온 걸 환영한다, 수호자여. 오늘의 광란이 시작되려 한다, 모두가 너를 기다리고 있어."
"네가 무엇을 가지고 오든, 나는 네게 흡족한 밤을 선사할 수 있도록 하지."

당신은 단 한 가지 물건만 가지고서 입장할 수 있습니다. 그게 이 이야기의 광란에서 당신의 감각적 체험을 결정지을 거예요. 선택해보세요! 폰토스가 여러분 모두를 위해 '은심×200' 을 준비했답니다.

***📢 本期 UGC 征集活动奖励规则的调整***

致守密人：
随着征集活动改为「每个大版本举办一次」，我们收到了非常多高质量的投稿作品。出于公平性的考虑，我们对评奖方式做了如下调整：
🥇 一等奖：取该类别前 5%（若不足 5 人，则取 5 人）
🥈 二等奖：取该类别 5%–15%（若不足 10 人，则取 10 人） 
🌞 参与奖：其余有效投稿的守密人均可获得

绘画作品、综合作品、攻略赛道依然各自独立评选，且奖励内容维持不变，仅调整了评奖方式。所有比例、名额均以 投稿人数 计算。
本次调整是为了让创作者拥有更充裕的创作时间和更多的获奖机会，我们真心希望每一位用心创作的守密人都能得到应有的认可。也感谢大家一直以来的支持与创作——每一份作品，都是我们继续前进的动力💙
---

***📢 Updates to the UGC Submission Campaign Reward Rules***

Dear Keepers,

Now that the Submission Campaign is held once per major version, we've received an amazing number of high-quality entries. To keep judging fair, we've adjusted the reward rules as follows:

🥇 1st Place: Top 5% of the category (if fewer than 5 entrants, the top 5 are selected) 
🥈 2nd Place: The 5%–15% range of the category (if fewer than 10 entrants, the top 10 are selected)
🌞 Participation Prize: Granted to all other Keepers with a valid submission

Fan Art, Mixed Media, and Game Guide will each be judged independently, and the reward contents remain unchanged — only the judging method has been updated. All percentages and quotas are calculated based on the number of contributors, not the number of submissions.

This change is meant to give creators more time to craft their work and more chances to be recognized. We sincerely hope every Keeper who pours their heart into their creations receives the recognition they deserve. Thank you all for your ongoing support and creativity — every single work is what keeps us moving forward. 💙
